reportingWebhook.label: Webhook URL for the shared daily reporting channel

discordApplicationPublicKey.label: Discord Application Public Key
discordApplicationPublicKey.helpText: From Discord Developer Portal → General Information → Public Key. Also set this as DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY on your Cloudflare Worker.

discordInteractionsWorkerUrl.label: Cloudflare Worker URL (Discord interactions proxy)
discordInteractionsWorkerUrl.helpText: Your deployed Cloudflare Worker URL, e.g. https://spectrum-modmail-discord.your-name.workers.dev — paste this into Discord's Interactions Endpoint URL field.

discordInteractionsWorkerSecret.label: Cloudflare Worker shared secret
discordInteractionsWorkerSecret.helpText: Same random string set as WORKER_SECRET in Cloudflare Worker settings. Used so Reddit can register tickets with the worker.

outgoing.label: Send outgoing mod messages to Discord

ignoreUsers.label: Ignore list (comma-separated usernames, don't include u/)
ignoreUsers.helpText: Add Reddit usernames (case-insensitive) separated by commas to skip them from webhook payloads.

rolePing.label: Discord Role ID to Ping
rolePing.helpText: Enter a Discord Role ID to ping when a message is sent. Leave blank to disable.

onlyModDiscussions.label: Only Sync Mod Discussions
onlyModDiscussions.helpText: If enabled, only mod discussion messages will be sent to the webhook.
